src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Configure Spring Boot application startup metrics buffering to capture startup timing data.
Remove unused imports related to the removed CORS interceptor configuration.
Remove the addInterceptors method that configured a custom CORS interceptor.
Add import for LmsFilterSecurityInterceptorObjectPostProcessor to support new security interceptor configuration.
Add import for RestSecurityLoggingConfig to enable security logging configuration.
Add import for ReferrerPolicyHeaderWriter to configure referrer policy headers.
Enable CORS configuration in the main HTTP security chain.
Apply RestSecurityLoggingConfig to the main HTTP security chain for logging.
Add object post processor to the main HTTP security authorize requests chain.
Configure Content Security Policy headers for the main HTTP security chain.
Configure Referrer Policy headers for the main HTTP security chain.
Add object post processor to the LTI HTTP security authorize requests chain.
Configure Content Security Policy headers for the LTI HTTP security chain.
Configure Referrer Policy headers for the LTI HTTP security chain.
Remove /actuator/** from the list of ignored paths in WebSecurity configuration.
Add a global security requirement to the OpenAPI definition to enforce OAuth2 authentication for all endpoints.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.after:
@OpenAPIDefinition(info = @Info(title = "Course Setup Wizard REST Endpoints", version = "${course-setup-wizard.version}"),
      security = @SecurityRequirement(name = "security_auth_coursesetupwizard"))

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Import the SecurityRequirement annotation class needed for the new OpenAPI definition.
Add a timezone configuration field to the ToolConfig class.
Add imports for java.time classes to support new date validation logic.
Add conditional logic to include blueprint course status in the model if the course is an eligible blueprint destination.
Implement date validation for class dates before processing the import, returning an error view if invalid.
Update content selection label for 'ALL' option and add support for 'ALL_WITH_BLUEPRINT_SETTINGS' option.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.before: multiValueMap.add("Content selection", "Import the entire course, all content, and settings");

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Add a helper method to validate date strings using java.time.LocalDate with strict resolution.
Add Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) support to the REST controller using a Spring Boot configuration property.
Replace legacy null/empty string check with modern String.isBlank() for cleaner code.
